inline_comments.message: Just found out that the 0.6.3 CDS released artifact has some traces of SNAPSHOT (and seem to have been wiped off from the released repo only today) and they will release 0.6.4. Raised a bug for this on the CDS board: https://jira.onap.org/browse/CCSDK-1795. Its probably a good idea for us to revert this one even though it is not currently being used.
